ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "syllabus_url" TEXT /* URL to the course syllabus */,
  "enrollment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when students can start enrolling in the course */,
  "enrollment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment period ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the course (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours for the instructor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instructor (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date the group was formed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the group is working on */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the group */,
  "group_status" TEXT /* Current status of the group (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "group_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who is the leader of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_group_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_leader_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL to the project repository or website */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  "evaluation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the project is evaluated (e.g., Weekly, Bi-Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being evaluated */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group being evaluated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor conducting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score given to the group project */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., Mid-term, Final) */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., Peer Review, Instructor Review) */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the evaluation (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* General comments or feedback for the overall evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "criterion_weight" REAL /* Weight of the criterion in the overall evaluation */,
  "criterion_status" TEXT /* Current status of the criterion (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criterion_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the score is part of */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being scored */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given for the criterion */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided for the criterion */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., Numerical, Letter Grade) */,
  "score_status" TEXT /* Current status of the score (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criterion_scores_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criterion_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the student belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the student in the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "participation_score" INTEGER /* Score given for the student's participation in the group */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Current status of the member in the group (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "participation_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the student's participation in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)
